article_title: B.C. Reg. 287/2024 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: BC Assessment updates 2025 valuation rates for railways, pipelines, power lines, and telecom rights of way
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 287/2024 amends the Railway, Pipeline, Electric Power and Telecommunications Corporation Rights of Way Valuation Regulation, updating the reference year from 2024 to 2025 and replacing the valuation rate table effective for the 2025 assessment cycle.
briefs.action_required: Review updated 2025 valuation rates to assess their impact on your property assessment and tax obligations.

key_dates.label: BC Rights of Way Valuation Regulation 2025 rates take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 287/2024 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
